## Findings
- [ ] **[WARN][Docs] New CLI flag not documented**
  - **Status quo:** `--include-embedding` flag added in commit 1d1f44b for `search` and `get` commands is not mentioned in README.
  - **Likely cause:** Feature commit did not include README update.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add brief mention in README Quickstart or Features section.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` or manual README update

- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] Low coverage on new stripEmbedding helper**
  - **Status quo:** `cmd/output.go:57` (stripEmbedding) has 32% coverage.
  - **Likely cause:** New function added in feature commit; tests cover some paths but not all type branches.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add tests for remaining Memory/SearchResult type branches.
  - **Handoff:** `/test-coverage` → `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage`
